name: Setup project skeleton
description: Create React app structure with src/App.tsx and src/styles.css.

name: Implement layout and logo
description: Build centered container, add Google logo using inline SVG with correct colors.

name: Create search bar with glassmorphism
description: Add input field with glass effect: backdrop-filter: blur, semi-transparent background, border, and box-shadow. Placeholder and icon styling.

name: Add action buttons
description: Two buttons styled with glass effect, hover scale/opacity transitions. They can be non-functional or alert placeholders.

name: Style background and responsiveness
description: Apply animated gradient background (@keyframes), center everything, ensure works on mobile with appropriate sizing.
